name: call-log-sync-system
description: Enterprise Android Call Log Sync — Monorepo

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @call-log/dashboard && npm run dev -w @call-log/api
scripts.dev:split: concurrently -n api,dashboard -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @call-log/api" "npm run dev -w @call-log/dashboard"
scripts.start: npm run build -w @call-log/dashboard && npm run build -w @call-log/api && npm run start -w @call-log/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @call-log/plugin && npm run build -w @call-log/api && npm run build -w @call-log/mobile && npm run build -w @call-log/dashboard
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:plugin && npm run build:mobile && npm run cap:sync -w @call-log/mobile
